global:
Usage: zendesk-cli <command> [args] [options]


Tickets & Attachments:
  ticket-list                 list all tickets
  ticket-list-recent          list recently updated tickets
  ticket-show <id>            show a single ticket
  ticket-show-many <ids>      show multiple tickets by id
  ticket-create <subject> <body> create a new ticket
  ticket-update <id>          update a ticket
  ticket-update-many <ids>    update multiple tickets
  ticket-delete <id>          delete a ticket
  ticket-delete-many <ids>    delete multiple tickets
  ticket-merge <id> <target-id> merge tickets into a target ticket
  ticket-related <id>         list related ticket information
  attachment-show <id>        show attachment metadata
  attachment-upload <file>    upload a file attachment
  attachment-delete <id>      delete an attachment
  ticket-field-list           list all ticket fields
  ticket-field-show <id>      show a ticket field
  ticket-form-list            list all ticket forms
  ticket-form-show <id>       show a ticket form
  tag-list                    list all tags
  macro-list                  list all macros
  macro-show <id>             show a macro
  macro-apply <ticket-id> <macro-id> apply a macro to a ticket
  suspended-list              list suspended tickets
  suspended-recover <id>      recover a suspended ticket
  suspended-delete <id>       delete a suspended ticket
  incremental-tickets <start-time> incrementally export tickets

Comments:
  comment-list <ticket-id>    list comments for a ticket
  comment-create <ticket-id> <body> add a comment to a ticket
  comment-update <ticket-id> <comment-id> <body> update a comment (make private only)
  comment-redact <ticket-id> <comment-id> <text> redact a comment's text from ticket

Users:
  user-list                   list all users
  user-show <id>              show a single user
  user-me                     show the currently authenticated user
  user-show-many <ids>        show multiple users by id
  user-create <name> <email>  create a new user
  user-update <id>            update a user
  user-delete <id>            delete a user
  user-search                 search users by external_id, email, or query
  identity-list <user-id>     list identities for a user
  incremental-users <start-time> incrementally export users

Organizations:
  org-list                    list all organizations
  org-show <id>               show a single organization
  org-create <name>           create an organization
  org-update <id>             update an organization
  org-delete <id>             delete an organization
  org-search <external-id>    search organizations by external_id
  org-membership-list         list organization memberships
  org-membership-create <user-id> <org-id> create an organization membership
  org-membership-delete <id>  delete an organization membership
  incremental-orgs <start-time> incrementally export organizations

Groups:
  group-list                  list all groups
  group-show <id>             show a single group
  group-create <name>         create a group
  group-update <id>           update a group
  group-delete <id>           delete a group
  group-membership-list       list group memberships
  group-membership-create <user-id> <group-id> create a group membership
  group-membership-delete <id> delete a group membership

Search:
  search <query>              search tickets, users, or organizations (zendesk search syntax)

Views:
  view-list                   list all views
  view-show <id>              show a view
  view-execute <id>           execute a view (get tickets)
  view-count <id>             count tickets in a view
  view-count-many <ids>       count tickets in multiple views

Configuration:
  config-show                 show current configuration
  config-set <key> <value>    set a configuration value
  config-path                 show configuration file path
  config-list                 list all profiles
  config-use <name>           switch active profile
  config-new <name>           create a new profile

Global options:
  --help [command]            print help
  --json                      output response as JSON
  --raw                       output only the result value
  --version                   print version
  -s, --subdomain <subdomain> Zendesk subdomain
  -e, --email <email>         Zendesk agent email
  --token <token>             API token
  --password <password>       password for basic auth
  --oauth-token <token>       OAuth access token

ticket-list.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-list 

List all tickets

Options:
  --sort-by                   
  --sort-order                
  --status                    
  --per-page                  tickets per page (max 100)

ticket-list-recent.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-list-recent 

List recently updated tickets

ticket-show.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-show <id>

Show a single ticket

Arguments:
  <id>                        ticket id

ticket-show-many.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-show-many <ids>

Show multiple tickets by ID

Arguments:
  <ids>                       comma-separated ticket ids

ticket-create.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-create <subject> <body>

Create a new ticket

Arguments:
  <subject>                   ticket subject
  <body>                      comment body
Options:
  --priority                  
  --type                      
  --tags                      comma-separated tags
  --assignee-id               
  --group-id                  
  --requester-id              
  --status

ticket-update.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-update <id>

Update a ticket

Arguments:
  <id>                        ticket id
Options:
  --subject                   
  --priority                  
  --status                    
  --assignee-id               
  --group-id                  
  --tags                      
  --comment                   add a public comment
  --private-comment           add an internal note

ticket-update-many.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-update-many <ids>

Update multiple tickets

Arguments:
  <ids>                       comma-separated ticket ids
Options:
  --status                    
  --assignee-id               
  --group-id

ticket-delete.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-delete <id>

Delete a ticket

Arguments:
  <id>                        ticket id

ticket-delete-many.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-delete-many <ids>

Delete multiple tickets

Arguments:
  <ids>                       comma-separated ticket ids

ticket-merge.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-merge <id> <target-id>

Merge tickets into a target ticket

Arguments:
  <id>                        source ticket id
  <target-id>                 target ticket id

ticket-related.help:
zendesk-cli ticket-related <id>

List related ticket information

Arguments:
  <id>                        ticket id

attachment-show.help:
zendesk-cli attachment-show <id>

Show attachment metadata

Arguments:
  <id>                        attachment id

attachment-upload.help:
zendesk-cli attachment-upload <file>

Upload a file attachment

Arguments:
  <file>                      path to file to upload
Options:
  --filename                  override filename
  --token                     return only upload token

attachment-delete.help:
zendesk-cli attachment-delete <id>

Delete an attachment

Arguments:
  <id>                        attachment id

comment-list.help:
zendesk-cli comment-list <ticket-id>

List comments for a ticket

Arguments:
  <ticket-id>                 ticket id

comment-create.help:
zendesk-cli comment-create <ticket-id> <body>

Add a comment to a ticket

Arguments:
  <ticket-id>                 ticket id
  <body>                      comment body
Options:
  --public                    make comment public (default)
  --private                   make comment internal note
  --upload-tokens             comma-separated attachment upload tokens

comment-update.help:
zendesk-cli comment-update <ticket-id> <comment-id> <body>

Update a comment (make private only)

Arguments:
  <ticket-id>                 ticket id
  <comment-id>                comment id
  <body>                      new comment body

comment-redact.help:
zendesk-cli comment-redact <ticket-id> <comment-id> <text>

Redact a comment's text from ticket

Arguments:
  <ticket-id>                 ticket id
  <comment-id>                comment id
  <text>                      text to replace redacted content with

user-list.help:
zendesk-cli user-list 

List all users

Options:
  --role                      
  --per-page

user-show.help:
zendesk-cli user-show <id>

Show a single user

Arguments:
  <id>                        user id or "me"

user-me.help:
zendesk-cli user-me 

Show the currently authenticated user

user-show-many.help:
zendesk-cli user-show-many <ids>

Show multiple users by ID

Arguments:
  <ids>                       comma-separated user ids

user-create.help:
zendesk-cli user-create <name> <email>

Create a new user

Arguments:
  <name>                      user name
  <email>                     user email
Options:
  --role                      
  --verified                  
  --organization-id           
  --phone                     
  --locale

user-update.help:
zendesk-cli user-update <id>

Update a user

Arguments:
  <id>                        user id
Options:
  --name                      
  --email                     
  --role                      
  --organization-id           
  --phone                     
  --locale                    
  --verified

user-delete.help:
zendesk-cli user-delete <id>

Delete a user

Arguments:
  <id>                        user id

user-search.help:
zendesk-cli user-search 

Search users by external_id, email, or query

Options:
  --query                     search query
  --external-id               
  --email                     
  --per-page

identity-list.help:
zendesk-cli identity-list <user-id>

Arguments:

incremental-users.help:
zendesk-cli incremental-users <start-time>

Incrementally export users

Arguments:
  <start-time>                unix timestamp start
